UserComments.Comment: Main parking lot(1st 6 parking bays) is little short,with a normal-size vehicle U will be partially on sidewalk, dock carefully to not hit the wall behind non-standard short parking places, otherwise good,not checked amenities around, I was charging over night & sleeping here,which is not easy on EVN charging stations, as U must set alarm for every 3hrs.to interrupt charging to avoid extra fees,max.continuous charging time is 3hrs.,to fully charge Your vehicle U must restart charging (& thus the timer too) every 3hrs..Live long & prosper.

AddressInfo.Title: EVN Public Charging Station (AC).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: 8 parking places with unlimited public access, some other places with restricted access sharing same connectors from other side of the fence,6 places partially roofed & very short.

Connections.Comments: 6 charging points partially roofed,mounted in a fence,accessible from both sides,@ least 2 other charging points @ nearby house. Max.3hrs..
